raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Synthetic opioids like fentanyl can be as much as 100 times more potent than morphine.",
    "Preliminary data shows that in 2021, 5,722 of the 10,416 Californians who died from an overdose died from fentanyl.",
    "San Bernardino County saw a 930% increase in fentanyl-related deaths from 2018 through 2021.",
    "The number of fentanyl-related deaths in San Bernardino County increased yearly, with 30 reported in 2018, 74 in 2019, 227 in 2020, and 309 in 2021.",
    "There have been 415 fentanyl-related deaths in Riverside County in 2022.",
    "Overdoses have surged because fentanyl is much more powerful and is often laced into other illicit drugs without the user's knowledge.",
    "Advising a defendant of the dangers of their conduct upon conviction may deter future behavior."
  ]
}
```
